resources.string: Time to look away 👀
A tiny break for your eyes
Your eyes need a rest
Stop staring at that screen! 😅
Your eyes deserve a break
Time to recharge
A moment of focus 🧘
Blinkly reminds you
Don’t forget to blink 😉
Eye care made simple
20-20-20 rule: look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds. Your eyes will thank you!
Look into the distance for 20 seconds - it releases focusing strain.
20 seconds of faraway gaze and the fatigue starts to fade. Ready?
Just 20 seconds of looking away - you will be back in action. Let\'s do it!
Find something far away (at least 20 feet) and gaze at it for 20 seconds.
20–20-20: look far away, blink, and relax.
Look away from your screen for 20 seconds. Easier than you think!
Take a break: look into the distance for 20 seconds. Your eyes will love it.
A quick glance far away helps your eyes unwind. Try it right now!
Just 20 seconds looking far away — and you\'ve already done something great.
